parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "type": "robustness_alert",
  "strategyId": "{{ $json.strategyId }}",
  "strategyName": "{{ $json.strategyName }}",
  "message": "Strategy degradation detected - flagged for review",
  "sharpeDrop": "{{ $json.sharpeDrop }}",
  "winRateDrop": "{{ $json.winRateDrop }}",
  "currentSharpe": {{ $json.currentSharpe }},
  "originalSharpe": {{ $json.originalSharpe }},
  "currentWinRate": {{ $json.currentWinRate }},
  "originalWinRate": {{ $json.originalWinRate }},
  "flagForReview": true,
  "timestamp": "{{ $now.toISO() }}"
}

  "currentWinRate": {{ $json.currentWinRate }},

  "timestamp": "{{ $now.toISO() }}"
}
